_source: Five Parsecs: Tactics rulebook — The Soulless species list

species.description: Synthetic beings operating as a networked collective. All Soulless share a single profile — there are no tiers or individual variation.

traits.name: Synthetic
traits.description: Immune to morale effects, gas, and toxins

traits.name: Machine Learning
traits.description: After a unit is destroyed, all remaining Soulless units get +1 to hit for the rest of the battle

traits.name: Hardened Network
traits.description: 3+ Saving Throw against hacking and electronic warfare

units.name: Soulless Unit
units._note: Single profile for all Soulless — no tiers
